abilities.name: Shootin' Fish in a Barrel
abilities.text: Once per turn. This model may remove a Tide marker touching a (t) generated by this model. If it does so, draw a card.

abilities.name: Stand and Fire
abilities.text: If this model is unengaged, enemy models that declare the Charge action within 12" of this model are dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Honeycomb Hwacha
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action does not deal additional damage from raises. For each raise this action receives, deal +1 damage to enemy models within (i)2" of the target.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Gut Feeling
triggers.text: Once per activation. Choose a suit. Target may discard a card of the chosen suit. If it does not, declare this action again.

triggers.name: Cluster Bomb
triggers.text: When resolving, this action does not generate a (i) and instead deals +2 damage.

actions.name: Signal Flare
actions.effects: The target heals 2, moves up to 2" towards this model, and gains a Drift token.

triggers.name: Sinkhole
triggers.text: Make a Tide marker into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Collateral Damage
triggers.text: Remove a marker or a destructible terrain piece within 2" of the target.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
